title: G2's Vanilla Optimized
description: G2bb's custom modpack for optimizing and quality of life changes.
body:
# G2bb's Vanilla Optimized

G2bb's custom modpack with a wholistic view of optimization. This pack brings preformance, visual, and quality of life, and more improvements to the base game. Come check it out at [Twitch.tv/G2bb](https://twitch.tv/g2bb)!

![RTX Water Caustics](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Swe5hPTr/images/bb382897aff4ade2b158b9d31cf520e0af22ebe6.png)

This is my custom pack of essential mods for my way-of-play, it may not be perfect for you and for that reason I am sharing it with an open license to remix as you please! To be perfectly honest I am publishing this mostly for 2 reasons, to keep my modpack more standardized since I have been pretty much winging it each update up to this point, and to share my modpack with my friends, but I figured as I stream my gameplay and people often ask about what mods/shaders/resource packs I use I might as well share them here too. So what does this mod pack bring?

## **Just for fun:**
- Do a Barrel Roll - enjarai

## **Preformance Improvements:**
- ImmediatelyFast - RaphiMC
- Indium - Comp500
- Lithium - jellysquid3
- Nvidium - cortex
- Sodium - jellysquid3


## **A/V Improvements:**
- 3D Skin Layers - tr7zw
- AmbientSounds - creativemd
- Blur+ (Fabric) - Motschen
- Contenuity - PepperCode1
- Distant Horizons - jeseibel
- FabricSkyBoxes - AMereBagatelle
- Falling Leaves - Randommcsumthin
- Iris Shaders - coderbot
- Make Bubbles Pop - Tschipcraft
- Nicer Skies - ZtereoHYPE
- Not Enough Animations - tr7zw
- Presence Footsteps - Sollace
- Sound Physics Remastered - henkelmax
- Spawn Animations - Tschipcraft
- Villager Names - Serilum
- [EMF] Entity Model Features - Traben
- [ETF] Entity Texture Features - Traben
- Particular - Chai


## **Resource Packs:**
- Connected Textures (CTM) Overhaul - xokz
- Default PBR - Sinan
- Dramatic Skys - thebaum64
- Even Better Enchants - mythitorium
- Fast Better Grass - Fabulously Optimized
- Fresh Animations - FreshLX
- PNAPBR - LackinToes
- Parallax TBR - MSameedC


## **Shaderpacks:**
- AstraLex Shaders - LexBoosT
- Aurora's Shaders - Crafter Aurora
- BSL Shaders - CaptTatsu
- Bloop Shaders - espen96
- Body Camera Shader - LoLip_p
- Complementary Shaders - Reimagined - EminGT
- Complementary Shaders - Unbound - EminGT
- Hysteria Shaders - ElocinDev
- Miniature Shader - ukrech
- Noble Shaders - BelmuTM
- OpenShad - WavinGraphics
- Phoxel - Despatra
- RenderPearl - Luracasmus
- Rethinking Voxels - gri573
- Shrimple - Null
- Soft Voxels Lite - RRe36
- Solas Shader - septonious
- Vector - WoMspace
- VanillaPuddingTart - BalintCsala
- Voyager shader 2.0 - 6ix7even


## **Information/Tools:**
- AppleSkin - squeek502
- Armor Statues Companion - Asch
- Command Macros - Kryptonaught
- Detail Armor Bar - RedLime
- Inventory Profiles Next - blackd
- Lightly - andi-makes
- Mod Menu - TerraformersMC
- Not Enough Crashes - natanfudge
- Reece's Sodium Options - FlashyReese

## **Quality of Life:**
- AuthMe - axieum
- BetterF3 - TreyRuffy
- Dark Loading Screen - A5b84
- Essential Mod - SparkUniverse
- Shulker Box Tooltip - MisterPeModder
- Sodium Extra - FlashyReese
- TweakerMore - fallen-breath
- Zoomify - isxander


## **Multiplayer:**
- Simpler Voice Chat - henkemax
- Spyglass Astronomy - Nettakrim


## **Other:**
- Archietechury API - Archietechury
- Collective - Serillum
- CreativeCore - creativemd
- Fabric Api - modmuss50
- Fabric Language Kotlin - modmuss50
- MaLiLib - masa
- Text Placeholder API - Patbox
- YetAnotherConfigLib - isxander
- libIPN - blackd
- oωo (owo-lib) - wisp-forest

_I can not confirm that all mods are enabled in every version, each version of this pack has the mods that are available at time of release. Additionally I cannot confim that all included mods are accounted for, I may forget to update this description._
